CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Speed of travel through hyperspace. Drag right to go faster.
CONTROLS.NAME: travel_speed

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Yaw — pan the camera left or right.
CONTROLS.NAME: cam_yaw

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Streak length — controls how long the warp trails are.
CONTROLS.NAME: speed_rate

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Primary color of the hyperspace effect.
CONTROLS.NAME: base_color

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: How quickly the hue drifts over time. 0 = locked, 1 = fast cycling.
CONTROLS.NAME: color_shift

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Visual style of the hyperspace effect.
CONTROLS.NAME: texture_style

DESCRIPTION: Raymarched hyperspace warp tunnel with audio reactivity. Control speed, direction, color, and visual style.
TITLE: Hyperspace
